title: Preview Manifest
description: Character reference images, expression headshots, and scene sample images produced by the preview stage. Character reference images and expression headshots are passed as reference_image to Seedream in the generate stage. Scene images are for human confirmation only.

character_anchors.description: Character reference images, expression headshots, and locked core_traits. Reference images anchor identity; expression headshots anchor both identity AND specific emotions in the generate stage.

reference_image_path.description: File path to the character's neutral full-body reference image (front-view standing, neutral expression, light-gray background). Used as fallback reference_image when no matching expression headshot exists.

core_traits.description: IMMUTABLE physical identity description (age, face, hair, body, clothing, accessories). Copied verbatim into every prompt. Does NOT include expression or emotion.

expression_headshots.description: Expression headshots with composite reference images for each unique emotion this character displays across panels. Each composite (headshot + full-body side-by-side) anchors both identity AND the target expression for Seedream. The composite is passed as reference_image in the generate stage.

emotion.description: The emotion label (e.g. 操心, 惊讶, 开心, 悲伤, 尴尬, 释然, 决心). Matches panel.expression[character].emotion.

headshot_path.description: File path to the expression headshot image (close-up face showing this emotion, light-gray background).

composite_reference_path.description: File path to the composite reference image (headshot + neutral full-body side-by-side, 1024×1024). THIS is the image passed as image_path to image_selector in the generate stage.

facial_expression.description: The facial expression description used to generate this headshot (from the expression variation library)

views.description: Views included in the reference image

usage.description: How this image is used in the generate stage. Always 'reference_image' — passed to Seedream for identity anchoring.

approved.description: Whether the user approved this character's visual identity and expression headshots

scene_samples.description: Scene sample images for HUMAN CONFIRMATION ONLY. NOT passed as reference images to Seedream — scene variety comes from text descriptions (master_description + camera_angle + atmosphere).

reference_image_path.description: File path to the scene sample image. For human confirmation only — NOT passed as reference_image to Seedream.

master_description.description: Core scene description with fixed elements (room layout, furniture, color scheme, key props). Used in every prompt for this scene.

usage.description: How this image is used in the generate stage. Always 'human_confirmation_only' — scene images are NOT passed to Seedream as they constrain composition and cause identical backgrounds.

characters_included.description: Character names shown in this scene sample

approved.description: Whether the user approved this scene's visual setting

prompt_templates.description: Locked prompt templates for the generate stage. Character template uses reference_image + varied expression. Scene template uses text-only description variation.

example_filled.description: One example of the template filled with actual values

reference_image_strategy.description: Documents the reference image strategy for the generate stage

character_images.description: Expression headshots are passed as image_path to Seedream — anchors both character identity AND target expression. Neutral full-body reference used as fallback when no matching headshot exists.

scene_images.description: NOT passed as reference_image — human confirmation only. Scene variety comes from text descriptions (master_description + camera_angle + atmosphere).

style_lock.description: Style keywords carried forward from style_decision (immutable)
